publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ፩አምላክ፨ ገድል፡ ወስምዕ፡ ዘቅዱስ፡ ስብስትያኖስ፡ ዘፈጸመ፡ ገድሎ፨ አመ፡ ፳ወ፭፡ ለወርኃ፡ ጥር፡
Gadla Sǝbǝstyānos: mainText
msItem.incipit: ጸሎቱ፡ ወበረከቱ፡ ወፍቅረ፡ አምላኩ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ለዓለመ፡ አሜን፨
ወኮነ፡ ልደቱ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ስብስትያኖስ፡ በሀገረ፡ ናርቦና፡ ዘእምሀገረ፡ እምርት፡ እምአድባረ፡ ኢዮልያ፨ ወተምህረ፡ መጻሕፍተ፡ በሀገረ፡ ሚላኖ፡
msItem.explicit:
ወኮነ፡ ዕረፍቱ፡ አመ፡ ፳ወ፭ ለጥር፨
ወሎቱ፡ ያብዕሉ፡ በሀገረ፡ ሮሜ፡ ሰብእ፡ መሃይምናን፡ በፍሥሐ፡ ወበኃሤት፡ ወአዕርጎ፡ መሥዋዕት፡ ወበምሒረ፡ ነዳይ፡ እንዘ፡ ይትአመኑ፡ በጸሎቱ፡ ማሕየዊት፨
ጸሎቱ፡ ወበረከቱ፡ ወፍቅረ፡ ሰላሙ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፨
ስብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ዘረሰዮ፡ ድልወ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ ጸጋ፡ ወላዕሌነ፡ ይኩን፡ ሀብተ፡ በረከቱ፡ አሜን፨

msItem.title: Gadla Sǝbǝstyānos: Salām
Hymn to ʾEwosṭātewos
msItem.incipit: እንዘ፡ ሀሎኩ፡ በተሰዶ፡ ወበተመቅሖ፡ ዕፁብ። ተዝካረ፡ ዕድወተከ፡ ባሕረ፡

msItem.title: ʾO-rǝḫrǝḫta ḫǝllinā
Sǝnkǝssār Commemoration of Mary for the 16th Yakkātit
Sǝnkǝssār Commemoration of Mary for the 16th Yakkātit: Commemoration
Sǝnkǝssār Commemoration of Mary for the 16th Yakkātit: Salām
Yǝweddǝsǝwwa malāʾǝkt la-Māryām
Malkǝʾ-hymn to Our Lady Mary
Hymn to Our Lady Mary
ʾƎsaggǝd laki ʾǝsaggǝd laki ʾǝsaggǝd laki wa-ʾǝweddǝsaki
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Title
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ አሐዱ፡ አምላክ። ንወጥን፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክሬስቶስ፨ ጽሒፈ፡ ተአምራቲሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ቅድስት፡ ድንግል፡ በከልኤ፨ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፨

ጸሎታ፡ ወበረከታ፨ ወምሕረተ፡ ፍቁር፡ ወልዳ፨ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ንጉሥነ፡
ዮሐንስ።። ወምስሌነሂ፡
ዘናፈቅራ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፨

msItem.title: Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of Hildephonsus (Dexius) of Toledo
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Hildephonsus (Dexius) of Toledo
Soba ʾaṣḥafa Daqsǝyos taʾammǝrǝki qǝddusa
Taʾammǝraki Māryām ḫāṭǝʾ wǝʾǝtu za-ʾastato
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 1: Introduction
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of a picture of Mary speaking to a worker
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a picture of Mary speaking to a worker
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 2, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of a Jew of ʾAḫmīm
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a Jew of ʾAḫmīm
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 3, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the scribe Damianus from Philippi
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the scribe Damianus from Philippi
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 4, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the Bishop of Rome, ʾAbbās (Leo)
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the Bishop of Rome, ʾAbbās (Leo)
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 5, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the monk Isaac
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the monk Isaac
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 6, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the child girl called Mary, from Dafrā
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the young girl called Mary, from Dafrā
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 7, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of a French painter whose scaffold was overthrown by the devil
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a French painter whose scaffold was overthrown by the devil
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 8, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of a sick man in a hospital whom Mary carries to Jerusalem
Miracle of a sick man in a hospital whom Mary carries to Jerusalem
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 9, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the youth Zechariah, from Rome
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the youth Zechariah, from Rome
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 10, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of Juliana and Barbara from Bethlehem
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Juliana and Barbara from Bethlehem
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 11, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of three Arabs in Rīf and Salomon, abbot of Kalamon
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of three Arabs in Rīf and Salomon, abbot of Kalamon
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 12, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the construction of a church in Jericho
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the construction of a church in Jericho
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 13, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the blind priest John from the church of St Mercurius in Cairo
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the blind priest John from the church of St Mercurius in Cairo
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 14, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of a rich man from Qʷalāsis who fought the Qʷǝz and whose eye was pierced by an arrow
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a rich man from Qʷalāsis who fought the Qʷǝz and whose eye was pierced by an arrow
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 15, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of Abraham, his wife Gerā and their blind daughter Elisabeth from Badramān
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Abraham, his wife Gerā and their blind daughter Elisabeth from Badramān
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 16, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of a widow and her poor daughters Maria, Martha, and Yawāhit
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a widow and her poor daughters Maria, Martha, and Yawāhit
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 17, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the two scribes who were brothers
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the two scribes who were brothers
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 18, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of George the Younger, who was delivered from prison
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of George the Younger, who was delivered from prison
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 19, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the old priest Qaṭīr at ʾƎlkǝsus (al-Khusus)
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the old priest Qaṭīr at ʾƎlkǝsus (al-Khusus)
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 20, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the two brothers Tāg and Nazīb from Dalgā
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the two brothers Tāg and Nazīb from Dalgā
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 21, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of a European man with a petrified foot
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a European man with a petrified foot
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 22, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the leprous Bishop Mercurius
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the leprous Bishop Mercurius
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 23, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of a woman from Hartalom/Hartarom with broken legs
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a woman from Hartalom/Hartarom with broken legs
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 24, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of Sophia, abbess of Mount Carmel
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Sophia, abbess of Mount Carmel
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 25, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the Phoenician evil man called Bārok
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the Phoenician evil man called Bārok
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 26, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of Anastasius, a deacon of Rome
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Anastasius, a deacon of Rome
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 27, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of a monk of the Monastery of St Samuel of Kalamon
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a monk of the Monastery of St Samuel of Kalamon
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 28, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: The Story of a Cannibal of Qǝmr
Miracle of Mary: The Story of the Cannibal of Qǝmr
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 29, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of a poor widow and her son who became a thief and was crucified
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a hanged brigand resuscitated because he loved the Virgin
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 30, referring to ,
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of a pregnant woman
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a pregnant woman
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 31, referring to
Miracles of Mary: ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi collection: Miracle of the thirsty dog whom the Virgin gave water
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the thirsty dog whom the Virgin gave water
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 32, referring to
ʾAkko-nu bǝʾsi: Stanza 33: General praise
Māḫleta ṣǝge
Malkǝʾa fǝlsatā
msItem.incipit: ሰላም፡ ለፍልሰተ፡ ሥጋኪ፡ ምስለ፡ ነፍስኪ፡ ኢመዋቲ፡
msItem.colophon: በሥምረተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ክቡር፡ ወልዑል፡ ወበረድኤታ፡ ለአክሊለ፡ ምክሕነ፡ ወትምክሕተ፡ ኵልነ፡ እግዝእተ፡ ኵልነ፡ ቅድስት፡ ድንግል፡ ወላዲቱ፡ ማርያም፡ ተጽሕፎተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለይእቲ፡ ምልእተ፡ ቅድስና፤ ወልዕልተ፡ ውዳሴ፡ እግዝእትነ፤ ተፈጸመ፡ በዕለተ፡ መድኃኒት፡ ወውእቱ፡ ዕለተ፡ ዓርብ፤ በ፸ወ፩፻ወ፵ወ፩፡ ዓመት፡ እምተፈጥሮተ፡ ዓለም፤ ወበ፲፻ወ፯፻ወ፵ወ፩፡ ዓመት፡ እምልደተ፡ መድኃኒነ፡ ክርስቶስ፤ ወበ፲፻ወ፫፻ወ፷ወ፯፡ እምዓመተ፡ ሰማዕታት። ወበ፲፻፲ወ፭እምዓመተ፡ ተንበላት፡ እንዘ፡ አበቅቴ፡ ወርኅ፡ ፲ወ፭፡ ወአበቅቴ፡ ፀሐይ፡ ፯፡ ወበ፸ወ፰ዕለት፡ እምግብና፡ ናሬል፡ ሓጋያዊ፡ ዘየዓውድ፡ ኃዋኅወ፡ ሳውዳ፡ ፺ወ፩፡ ዕለት። አመ፡ ፯ለአዳር፡ በዕብራውያን፤ ወአመ፡ ፰፡ ለማርሶ፡ በሮማውያን። ወአመ፡ ፲ወ፫፡ ለበረምኃት፡ በግብጻውያን። ወአመ፡ ፳ወ፪፡ በሠርቀ፡ ሌሊት። ወአመ፡ ፲ወ፫፡ በሠርቀ፡ መዓልት፡ ለየካቲት፡ ዘኢትዮጵያን። እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ፀሐይ፡ በማኅፈደ፡ ሑት፡ ቅድመ፡ ይረድ፡ ኆኅተ፡ ሐመል። ወስብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ወጣኒ፡ ወፈጻሚ፡ ከሃሊ፡ ወገባሪ። ወካልኣንሂ፡ ኍልቈ፡ ድርሳናት፡ ዘጸሎታት፡ እለ፡ ሀለዉ፡ ጽሑፋነ፡ ምስለ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ተአምር፡ ፲ወ፱እሙንቱ። ዘውእቶሙ፡ ፩፡ ኪዳነ፡ ምሕረት። ፪፡ ወበሳድስ፡ ወርኅ። ፫፡ ለኖኅ፡ ሐመሩ። ፬፡ በሰጊድ፡ ሰለም። ፭፡ ድንግልተ፡ ሥጋ፡ ወሕሊና። ፮፡ እሰግድ፡ ልኪ፡ ወእዌድሰኪ። ፯፡ ተአምረ፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም። ፰፡ ማኅሌተ። ጽጌ። ፱፡ መንበረ፡ ፀሓይ። ፲በሰማይ፡ ወበምድር። ፯፡ እለ፡ እሴብሕ፡ ጸጋኩ፡ ፰ኦክርስቶስ፡ እንግዳ፡ ፲ወ፱፡ በኵለ፡ ሕማም። ወካዕበ፡ ንእኅዝ፡ ዘተጽሕፈት ዛቲ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ በትእዛዙ፡ ዓቢይ፡ ለንጉሠ፡ ነገሥት፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ወንግሥት፡ ሰብለ፡ ወንጌል፡ እምአመ፡ ነግሡ፡ በ፩ዓመት። እግዚአብሔር፡ ይጽሐፍ፡ ስሞ፡ በመንግሥተ፡ ሰማያት፡ ምስለ፡ ስመ፡ ጻድቃን፡ ወሰማዕት፡ አሜን።

msItem.title: Lamentations
Book of Odes
The Prayer of Hezekiah, King of Judah
The Prayer of Manasseh
The Prayer of Jonah
Ṣalota Dānǝʾel nabiy sǝbḥat za-ʾǝm-ʾAzāryā
Ṣalota śalastu daqiq
Third Song of the Three Youths in the Furnace
Matthew 25, 25-46
Mǝnbāb za-fǝlsatā

bibl.title: De transitu Mariae apocrypha aethiopice II
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
De transitu Mariae apocrypha aethiopice II
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation in the upper right corner by the library. Two unnumbered blank leaves each at the beginning and the end, both referred to as in the library's digitization.

collation.note: Only the quire structure of the beginning of the manuscript is given here. The manuscript seems to be composed mostly of quaternions.

layout.ab: Pricking and ruling are visible.
Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are visible.
layout.note: Only each second horizontal ruled line is ruled through the centrefold.
layout.ab: The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.
Pricking and ruling are visible.
Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.
Pricking and ruling are visible.
Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.
Pricking and ruling are visible.
Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are visible.
layout.note: Ruling is carried out irregularly. Not all pages have horizontal ruled lines.
layout.ab: The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above and below the ruling.
Pricking and ruling are visible.
Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.

handNote.desc: Written in a large and beautiful character.

bibl.title: Inventaire des peintures datées du VXIIe au début du XIXe siècles: questions sur l'art gondarien (Éthiopie)
Cahiers du CRA—Centre de recherches africaines

binding.decoNote: In the original boards, lined with yellow silk and covered with blind-tooled leather.

history.provenance: The manuscript had very probably belonged to a church in the Gondar area, from where it was taken by Tewodros and brought to Madḫāne ʿĀlam. It was then looted by the British Napier expedition in 1868.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)
